---
name: Feature request
about: Describe what you want built
---

**What**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why**
The problem this solves or the value it adds.

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1 (what must be true when this is done)
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

**Scope notes**
Anything explicitly out of scope, constraints, or design preferences.
